mapper.sql: c.id, c.run_id, c.step_id, s.step_key, c.checkpoint_key, c.stage, CAST(c.trigger_jsonb AS TEXT) AS trigger_jsonb, CAST(c.settle_jsonb AS TEXT) AS settle_jsonb, CAST(c.state_jsonb AS TEXT) AS state_jsonb, CAST(c.delta_jsonb AS TEXT) AS delta_jsonb, CAST(c.artifact_refs_jsonb AS TEXT) AS artifact_refs_jsonb, c.captured_at, c.duration_ms, c.created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM checkpoint c LEFT JOIN test_run_step s ON s.id = c.step_id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM checkpoint c LEFT JOIN test_run_step s ON s.id = c.step_id WHERE c.source_type = 'RUN' AND c.run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY c.captured_at ASC, c.created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint ( id, source_type, run_id, step_id, checkpoint_key, stage, trigger_jsonb, settle_jsonb, state_jsonb, delta_jsonb, artifact_refs_jsonb, captured_at, duration_ms ) VALUES ( #{id}, 'RUN', #{runId}, #{stepId}, #{checkpointKey}, #{stage}, CAST(#{triggerJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{settleJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{stateJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{deltaJsonb} AS jsonb), CAST(#{artifactRefsJsonb} AS jsonb), #{capturedAt}, #{durationMs} ) ON CONFLICT (run_id, checkpoint_key) DO NOTHING
